description: S3 bucket publicly accessible with no encryption at rest
remediation: Enable S3 bucket encryption and remove public access block exemptions

description: Root account used for daily operations – MFA not enforced
remediation: Enable MFA on root account and create least-privilege IAM roles for daily use

description: EC2 instance running outdated kernel with known RCE vulnerability (CVE-2023-3269)
remediation: Patch kernel to latest stable version; schedule maintenance window

description: RDS PostgreSQL instance not encrypted and publicly accessible via 0.0.0.0/0
remediation: Enable RDS encryption; restrict security group to VPC CIDR only

description: Lambda function with overly permissive IAM role (AdministratorAccess)
remediation: Apply least-privilege IAM policy scoped to required actions only

description: Kubernetes dashboard exposed publicly without authentication
remediation: Disable public dashboard; enforce RBAC and restrict access to VPN only

description: CloudTrail logging disabled in us-west-2 region
remediation: Enable CloudTrail in all regions with log file validation enabled

description: Security group allows unrestricted SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0
remediation: Restrict SSH access to corporate IP ranges or deploy a bastion host

description: S3 bucket versioning disabled on backup storage
remediation: Enable versioning on all S3 buckets storing backups or sensitive data

description: GuardDuty finding: unusual API calls from unfamiliar geolocation (Russia)
remediation: Investigate API call origin; implement geo-blocking and alert rules

description: ECS container running as root user
remediation: Update container task definition to use non-root user

description: VPC Flow Logs not enabled in production VPC
remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs and ship to centralized SIEM

description: CloudFormation stack using hardcoded secrets in template parameters
remediation: Migrate secrets to AWS Secrets Manager or Parameter Store with encryption

description: SNS topic allows cross-account publishing with no resource policy
remediation: Apply resource-based policy restricting publishers to known AWS account IDs

description: EBS volume snapshots publicly shared
remediation: Remove public sharing from all EBS snapshots; audit snapshot permissions

description: ECR image with critical CVE in base image (log4j – CVE-2021-44228)
remediation: Rebuild container image using patched base image; scan with ECR image scanning

description: IAM password policy does not enforce complexity requirements
remediation: Update IAM account password policy to enforce length complexity and rotation

description: Unused IAM access key active for 180+ days
remediation: Deactivate and delete unused access keys; enforce 90-day rotation policy

description: EC2 instance with IMDSv1 enabled (SSRF risk)
remediation: Enforce IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances using instance metadata options

description: AWS Config recorder not enabled in all regions
remediation: Enable AWS Config recorder in all active regions for continuous compliance monitoring
